translations.en: Exodus
translations.zh: 厄瑟達斯
translations.note: NPC name，邪惡三位一體之一，勤勉之體現

translations.en: a stone statue of the evil Exodus.
translations.zh: 邪惡厄瑟達斯的石像。

translations.en: "For what dost thou return, Avatar?"
translations.zh: 「聖者，汝為何再度歸來？」

translations.en: You still remember vividly how you defeated Exodus in your third visit to Brittania.
translations.zh: 你仍清晰地記得第三次造訪不列顛尼亞時，你是如何擊敗厄瑟達斯的。

translations.en: Using the four cards, you tricked the accursed machine into destroying itself.
translations.zh: 你藉助四張牌，誘使那被詛咒的機器自我毀滅。

translations.en: The statue speaks!
translations.zh: 石像開口了！

translations.en: "We meet again, Avatar."
translations.zh: 「我們再度相遇，聖者。」

translations.en: "Fear not! I have but one @task now, and am no threat."
translations.zh: 「無需畏懼！我如今只有一個@task使命，不再構成威脅。」

translations.en: "Though I no longer bear the form of the machine you destroyed, yet still am I Exodus."
translations.zh: 「雖然吾不再以汝所摧毀之機器的形態存在，然吾仍是厄瑟達斯。」

translations.en: "The gargoyles have enshrined my spirit here as the embodiment of @diligence."
translations.zh: 「魔像將吾之靈魂奉祀於此，作為@diligence勤勉之體現。」

translations.en: "I was once a powerful daemon."
translations.zh: 「吾昔日乃一強大魔靈。」

translations.en: "Diligence was the essence of my soul--cold, unswerving diligence in my path of conquest."
translations.zh: 「勤勉乃吾靈魂之本質——冷酷、堅定不移地在征服之路上精進不輟。」

translations.en: "But in my devotion to achievement I lost sight of my original goals."
translations.zh: 「然而在對成就的執著中，吾失去了對最初目標的視野。」

translations.en: "Diligence without a goal is as worthless as a goal without diligence."
translations.zh: 「無目標的勤勉，如同無勤勉的目標，同樣毫無價值。」

translations.en: "The means cannot replace the end, and diligence cannot be the goal."
translations.zh: 「手段不能取代目的，勤勉本身不能成為目標。」

translations.en: "The gargoyles understand diligence."
translations.zh: 「魔像深諳勤勉之道。」

translations.en: "Their society is based on the diligent leading the wayward."
translations.zh: 「其社會以勤勉之人引導迷途者為基礎。」

translations.en: "In this way, they maintain their fight for survival in their harsh world."
translations.zh: 「如此，他們維持著在嚴酷世界中求存的鬥志。」

translations.en: "I have no concern for matters such as $Z."
translations.zh: 「$Z之事，吾不關心。」

translations.en: "I am enshrined here in eternal contemplation of the principle of @diligence."
translations.zh: 「吾永恆地奉祀於此，沉思@diligence勤勉之原則。」

translations.en: "I have no concern for matters such as $Z."
translations.zh: 「$Z之事，吾不關心。」

translations.en: "Contemplate what thou hast learned. Repeat after me the Mantra of Diligence."
translations.zh: 「默想汝所習得之事。隨吾覆誦勤勉真言。」
Us……

translations.en: "I can teach thee no more."
translations.zh: 「吾已無更多可教。」

translations.en: "Thy understanding is flawed. But I can teach thee no more."
translations.zh: 「汝之理解有所缺失。然吾已無更多可教。」

translations.en: "Farewell, Avatar."
translations.zh: 「別了，聖者。」

translations.en: "May thy diligence maintain thee on thy quest."
translations.zh: 「願汝之勤勉在使命中持守汝。」

translations.en: "Thou wilt need diligence to succeed in thy quest, Avatar."
translations.zh: 「汝的使命需要勤勉方能成功，聖者。」

translations.en: "But thou wilt most of all need a clear vision of thy goal to be worthy."
translations.zh: 「然最重要的是，汝需對目標有清晰的視野，方能稱得上聖者之名。」

translations.en: "$0 @diligence."
translations.zh: 「$0@diligence勤勉。」

translations.en: Thy deeds show a lack of
translations.zh: 汝之行為顯示缺乏

translations.en: Thy deeds show misguided
translations.zh: 汝之行為顯示迷失方向的

translations.en: Thy deeds show the value of thy
translations.zh: 汝之行為彰顯了汝之

translations.en: I admire thy deeds and thy
translations.zh: 吾欽佩汝之行為與汝之

translator_notes: 厄瑟達斯是U3反派機器魔靈，在魔像神殿中以勤勉原則之體現存在。「手段不能取代目的」是其核心教訓，對應厄瑟達斯被程式化的盲目執行所毀滅的宿命。真言「Us」保留英文。
